articles.title: Singer's Car with Medical Gear Stolen
articles.summary: Jesy Nelson, a singer from the band Little Mix, is asking for help because her car was stolen. The car is a black Range Rover, and it was taken from her home in Brentwood, Essex, early on a Sunday morning. Inside the car, there is important hospital equipment that her twin daughters need. Her daughters have a health condition called spinal muscular atrophy, which makes their muscles weak. Jesy posted on Instagram and is offering £10,000 to anyone who can help find the car. She wants people to contact her or the police if they see the car or know anything. This is a big problem because the equipment is really needed for her girls.

articles.title: A Big Decision About an Ambassador
articles.summary: This article talks about a problem with choosing a new ambassador to the United States. The ambassador is Lord Mandelson, and he was picked to represent the UK in Washington. But there was a mistake in checking his background for security. The prime minister, Sir Keir Starmer, says he did not know about this mistake when he chose Mandelson. Ministers say if Starmer had known, he would not have picked Mandelson. Now, people are asking questions about what happened and why the prime minister was not told sooner. Some people want the prime minister to resign because they think he misled others. The government is trying to figure out the facts and fix the process so this does not happen again.

articles.title: How the Iran War Affects Flight Prices and What You Can Do
articles.summary: The war between the U.S., Israel, and Iran is making it harder and more expensive to fly. This is because the war affects oil supplies, which are used to make jet fuel for airplanes. As jet fuel prices go up, airlines are charging more for flights and bags, and some are even canceling routes to save money. For example, Air Canada is stopping flights to New York for a few months. Experts say it's risky to wait for the war to end before booking flights because prices might stay high. To save money, travelers should book flights they can afford when they find them, but avoid the cheapest tickets called Basic Economy, which don't allow changes or refunds. Instead, choose Standard Economy tickets for more flexibility.

articles.title: Harry and Meghan's Trip to Australia
articles.summary: Harry and Meghan, who are not working royals anymore, visited Australia for four days. They did things like learning about Indigenous culture, watching sports, and visiting a war memorial, which made it seem like a royal tour. But many Australians did not know or care about their visit. Some people were upset because Australian taxpayers might have to pay for their security. The trip was carefully planned to avoid problems, and Harry and Meghan were friendly, taking selfies and hugging fans. They showed kindness, like Meghan talking to survivors of an attack and a boy about a book. Their team used the word 'connection' a lot to describe the visit.

articles.title: A Wedding During a Nuclear Accident
articles.summary: This is a story about Iryna and Serhiy, a young couple who got married in Pripyat, a city in Ukraine, on April 26, 1986. They were excited for their wedding day, but something scary happened nearby. A nuclear power plant called Chernobyl exploded, releasing dangerous radiation. At first, they didn't know what was going on. Serhiy saw soldiers in gas masks and smoke from the plant. He used his training to protect himself by putting wet fabric at the door. They still had their wedding, but later they had to leave their home because of the disaster. Now, they live in Berlin, having moved again to escape war. The story shows how people can find hope during tough times.

articles.title: A Special Meeting with a Former President
articles.summary: Former President Barack Obama met with New York Mayor Zohran Mamdani for the first time. They visited a child care center where they read a book called 'Alone and Together' to preschoolers and sang 'The Wheels on the Bus' together. This meeting happened on a Saturday. Mayor Mamdani is a young leader who wants to help working families in New York City. He has also met with President Donald Trump to talk about city issues. Obama offered to give advice to Mamdani, who is new to his job. The article shows how leaders from different political groups can work together for children and communities.
